key_metric: 5,023 OR4F annotations; 62.1% pseudogene overall; 11.1% at 7p to 99.8% at 15q.
interval_note: PHR sequence annotation signal, not a CHM13-only interval claim.
caveat: Canonical visual source; do not call it a BH-significant OR-family enrichment result.

key_metric: 10 OR4F genes across 7 communities; C3 OR q=0.071.
interval_note: Broader arm/community signal; gate any interval render through chm13.phrs.bed.
caveat: Presence pattern only; no community-family Fisher row survives BH correction.

interval_note: Both C1 arms have called CHM13 PHR rows.
caveat: Good slide signal; frame as D4Z4/DUX4L community signature, not GO enrichment.

interval_note: Broader subtelomeric arm/community signal; not every listed arm is a rendered CHM13 interval.
caveat: Best backbone slide after OR4F; report as pervasive duplicated gene-family presence, not significant ORA.

key_metric: C5 has DDX11L 7 genes, WASH 8, FAM138 6; IQSEC3 samples=453.
interval_note: C5 includes chr6_p, which lacks a called CHM13 PHR row.
caveat: Good duplicon-module signal; use the arms-without-called-PHR caveat explicitly.

key_metric: GTPBP6 in C15 samples=390; IQSEC3 in C5 samples=453; parked 309x GO statistic not used as final.
interval_note: GTPBP6 C15 includes chrY_p missing from CHM13 called PHR rows; IQSEC3 anchor is chr12_p.
caveat: Do not present 309x as validated production statistic without reanalysis; use as caveated backup or as motivation for copy-aware reanalysis.

interval_note: C15 includes chrY_p, which lacks a called CHM13 PHR row.
caveat: Useful biological callout; avoid implying chrY_p has a rendered CHM13 PHR interval unless using a non-CHM13 source.

key_metric: 9 C7-specific MTCO pseudogenes; MTCO Fisher q=0.071.
interval_note: C7 includes chr13_p, which lacks a called CHM13 PHR row.
caveat: Interesting but secondary for v5; Fisher is not BH-significant.
